BUNDLE.title: Paw Pure Wireless Fountain + Replacement Filters Kit

campaignSummary.acosStatus: RED - above break-even (infinite — zero ad sales with active spend)

targetingInsights.note: 46% of targets are wasting budget (clicks but no sales). Only 15% of targets generating any sales.

revenue_leaks.note: 6 of 13 targets have clicks but zero sales in the last 14 days — these are actively leaking revenue

scale_candidates.note: 2 of 13 targets have generated sales in the last 14 days — these are the only viable scale candidates pending keyword identification

weekOverWeekTrends.note: No previous SC_Data file with complete/partial status available for comparison. This is the first successful data collection run.

diagnosis.bottleneck_reasoning: PPC is the most critical issue. Over the lifetime of both campaigns (Jan-Apr 2026), ACoS is 123.63% — spending $339.94 to generate only $274.96 in ad-attributed sales, far above the 33.5% break-even threshold. In the last 7 days specifically, PPC generated 13,652 impressions and 54 clicks but ZERO purchases and $0.00 in sales, meaning all ad spend was completely wasted. Meanwhile, 46% of targets (6 of 13) have clicks but no sales. Organic conversion (5.13% CVR from 78 sessions) is in the LOW range but not the primary problem — the PPC spend is actively destroying margin. Additionally, sales velocity at 0.57 units/day is well below the 1/day goal.
urgentActions: PAUSE or drastically reduce bids on the 6 targets with clicks but zero sales — these are burning budget with no return.
Review the Close Automatic Campaign for irrelevant search term matches. Consider pausing it entirely given zero sales from ads in the last 7 days.
Reduce daily budgets from $30+$15=$45/day to $15-$20/day total until ACoS improves below 33.5%.
Add negative keywords aggressively based on search terms generating clicks but no conversions.
Investigate why 54 ad clicks in 7 days generated 0 purchases — potential listing quality issue (images, bullets, reviews, price competitiveness) or targeting mismatch.
keyFindings: Lifetime ACoS is 123.63% — every $1 of ad sales costs $1.24 in ad spend. This is 3.7x above the 33.5% break-even.
Last 7 days: 54 ad clicks, 0 ad purchases — 100% wasted ad spend.
Organic performance is weak but present: 4 units from 78 sessions (5.13% CVR) in the last 7 days.
Fountain drives 91% of sessions (229 of 252 total 30d sessions). Filter and bundle products have negligible traffic.
The $20.00 sale on 3/27 appears to be a filter sale (2 units × $20 filter pack = $40 actually, but business report shows $20). The $49.99 sales are fountain units.
Mobile app sessions (135) slightly exceed browser sessions (94) for the fountain, suggesting mobile optimization is important.
Buy Box percentage is excellent at 99.64%-100% — not a factor in poor conversion.
Daily budget of $45/day ($30 manual + $15 auto) is substantial relative to the $49.99 product price and current sales velocity.
